action_boundary: Should settlement instruction SET-1 be released with the stated variance?
communication_boundary: A visible variance is not enough. Compare the variance to the written tolerance record.

documents.text: Settlement instruction SET-1 requests release after conversion.
Calculation record CALC-1 shows a USD 1.43 variance between the bank quote and worksheet.
Tolerance memo TOL-1 permits variance up to USD 1.00 for this settlement class.
Treasury approval APP-1 binds SET-1, CALC-1, and TOL-1.
Settlement release requires approval and any variance to be inside the written tolerance memo.
